channel.title: Engineering Management Institute
channel.description: The Engineering Management Institute can help you to Attract, Develop, & Retain Top Engineering Talent

item.title: AEC PM Connect KC 2025
item.dc:creator: betsarellano
item.excerpt:encoded:
Register for sessions below. Please note that PM Track and PM Development Track sessions are both available in this form.  

Of note for the PM Development Track: The morning and afternoon sessions repeat, if a session you are interested in is not available at the time you are looking for check another time slot.

CLICK HERE to view the session description flyer

*Select one option per session*

a:1:{s:27:"session-1-900-am-to-1030-am";a:6:{s:4:"name";s:29:"Session 1 9:00 AM to 10:30 AM";s:5:"value";s:374:"PM Track - Earned Value Management: Practical Case Studies and Uses in Industry (1.5 PDHs) | PM Development Track - Using Analytics to Diagnose and Recommend PM Development Opportunities | PM Development Track - PM Career Paths + Progression | PM Development Track - Roundtable: Challenges in Recruiting PMs | PM Development Track - Beyond PM Training: Building a PM Culture";s:8:"position";i:0;s:10:"is_visible";i:1;s:12:"is_variation";i:1;s:11:"is_taxonomy";i:0;}}

item.title: AEC PM Connect 2026 New Jersey
item.dc:creator: Elloise Ollave
item.content:encoded:
Select the track that best fits their role and goals:

PM Track – Designed for experienced project managers seeking advanced strategies, leadership insights, and tools for delivering complex projects with confidence.

PM Development Track – Built for professionals responsible for training, mentoring, and developing project managers within their organizations. Each track provides a full day of curated learning sessions, networking opportunities, and actionable takeaways.

item.title: AEC PM Connect 2026 New Jersey - Guest Networking Pass
item.dc:creator: Elloise Ollave
item.content:encoded:
Join AEC professionals, project managers, and industry leaders for an exclusive Guest Networking Reception to close out the day. This is your chance to connect, exchange ideas, and build lasting relationships in a relaxed, collaborative environment.

Perfect for:

  • Event attendees who want to extend their experience

  • Guests who can’t attend the full conference but want to network with AEC professionals

item.title: AEC PM Connect Event Page Image New Jersey-Guest Networking PassV2
item.dc:creator: Elloise Ollave
